AgentKey is a plugin that connects your agent to live external data in one command. Install it into Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, or any MCP-based agent and instantly unlock access to search, web pages, social platforms, finance, e-commerce, business and crypto data. No integrations. No setup. Auto failover keeps workflows running.

AgentKey

AgentKey

Maker

Hey PH , I'm Cong, Founding engineer at Chainbase here. I've spent the past few months building AgentKey, a one-stop live data marketplace for your agent, and I want to share the three problems that took us the longest to get right.

1. Tool discovery [...] Hi Product Hunt, I'm Mogu, founder of Chainbase. Today I'm really happy to share the newest project out of our lab: AgentKey. It's been in private beta for a while, and a few thousand people have been using it and helping us shape it along the way, so it finally feels ready to put in front of you here. Here's the thing we kept coming back to. Agents have gotten genuinely good at doing tasks. What they don't have is eyes. They can reason and act, but they can't actually see the live internet, which is where almost all the useful tools and real-time data actually live. So you end up with a strange gap: an agent smart enough to do the work, sitting behind a window it can't look through. And today, giving an agent those eyes is a chore. You wire up one API for search, another for scraping,

# GPTBots.ai Reviews

### The community submitted 22 reviews to tell us what they like about GPTBots.ai, what GPTBots.ai can do better, and more.

4.9

Based on 22 reviews

Review GPTBots.ai? [...] 4.9

Based on 22 reviews

Review GPTBots.ai?

Reviewers mostly describe GPTBots.ai as easy to use and practical for building custom bots without coding. They repeatedly praise the clear navigation, drag-and-drop workflow, templates, plugins, API docs, and the ability to train bots on PDFs, policies, procedures, and other knowledge sources, then embed them for support or internal Q&A. Several say it improved productivity and handled business-specific needs well. The main criticism is speed: one user notes responses can take too long at times, though they did not see it as a deal-breaker.
